llm_eval.notes: Compiles; notion_config.require_or_skip/get_db_id exist; --dry-run present, fail-closed when plugin page missing (exit 2), choices-validated enums, secret via token loader not hardcoded. Minor: tempfile leaks on subprocess.check_output failure (os.unlink after call, no try/finally); find_plugin_page can KeyError on unexpected 2xx shape.
